case_title: WESTERN GRAVEL COMPANY VS. RICHARD KISER et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SONOMA COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ORDER TO TRANSFER CASE TO SONOMA COUNTY, AND FOR SANCTIONS
OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE AND FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT KISER, RICHARD KISER, SHANNON

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS RICHARD KISER AND SHANNON KISER'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE AND FOR SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS RESIDE IN SONOMA COUNTY. IT IS UNDISPUTED THAT THIS IS A MIXED ACTION CASE ENTITLING DEFENDANTS TO HAVE THE ACTION VENUED IN SONOMA COUNTY. THE VENUE PROVISION RELIED ON BY PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENFORCEABLE BOTH AS A MATTER OF LAW AND AS A MATTER OF FACT, FOR NO SUCH AGREEMENT WAS REACHED. GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S UNREASONABLE REFUSAL TO TRANSFER THE CASE, DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO REASONABLE COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $8,747.50. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
